ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "btc_price" REAL /* Bitcoin price at the time the tweet was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "quote_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet is a quote */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "default_profile_theme" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has a default profile theme */,
  "default_profile_image" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has a default profile image */,
  "total_account_likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes the user has received across all their tweets */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the tweet (0 to 1) */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the tweet (ranges from -1 to 1) */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Mentions in the tweet */,
  "engagement_metrics" TEXT /* Engagement metrics (e.g., likes, retweets, replies) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "urls" TEXT /* URLs used in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is verified */,
  "profile_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's profile */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "header_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's header image */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the user's account (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets_sentiment" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (0 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label of the tweet (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "subjectivity_score" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the tweet (0 to 1) */,
  "polarity_score" REAL /* Polarity score of the tweet (ranges from -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_model" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis model used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_entities" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity mentioned (e.g., hashtag, mention, URL) */,
  "entity_value" TEXT /* Value of the entity mentioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "entity_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_metrics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metrics */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user had on the given date */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user was following on the given date */,
  "tweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets the user had posted on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "price" REAL /* Bitcoin price on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis_models" (
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment analysis model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment analysis model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_name")
)
